markdown:
## Report Parity Framework

### Chapter Contract

| Chapter ID | Benchmark Title | Required Outputs | Required Markers | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| executive_summary | Executive Summary | - | - | Benchmark report includes a standalone executive summary chapter. |
| introduction_product_profile | Introduction | - | Properties | Benchmark introduction includes identity and physical-property tables. |
| market_capacity_selection | Capacity Selection | - | - | Current report structure carries market and capacity basis as a dedicated chapter even though the benchmark PDF folds it into surrounding sections. |
| literature_survey | Literature Survey | - | - | Benchmark report includes a standalone literature survey chapter. |
| process_selection | Process Selection | - | Route | Benchmark report includes process-route comparison and selection rationale. |
| site_selection | Site Selection | - | India | Benchmark report includes site-factor and India location rationale. |
| thermodynamic_feasibility | Thermodynamics of Reaction | - | ### Separation Thermodynamics Basis | Benchmark report contains dedicated thermodynamic basis and reaction feasibility discussion. |
| reaction_kinetics | Kinetics of Reaction | - | - | Benchmark report contains a dedicated kinetics chapter. |
| block_flow_diagram | Block Diagram | - | graph TD | Benchmark report includes a standalone process block diagram. |
| process_description | Process Description | - | ### Unit Sequence, ### Recycle Architecture | Benchmark report includes a long narrative process description. |
| material_balance | Material Balance | stream_table | ### Overall Plant Balance Summary, ### Section Balance Summary, ### Unit Packet Balance Summary, ### Long Stream Ledger | Benchmark report includes long unitwise stream tables. |
| energy_balance | Energy Balance | energy_balance | ### Overall Energy Summary, ### Section Duty Summary, ### Unit Thermal Packet Summary, ### Utility Consumption Basis | Benchmark report includes long unitwise energy-balance tables. |
| heat_integration_strategy | Heat Integration Strategy | heat_integration_study | - | Current report structure carries heat integration as a dedicated chapter-equivalent engineering section. |
| equipment_design_sizing | Sizing of Equipment | equipment_list | ### Storage and Inventory Vessel Basis, ### Major Process Equipment Basis, ### Heat Exchanger and Thermal-Service Basis, ### Rotating and Auxiliary Package Basis, ### Utility-Coupled Package Inventory, ### Datasheet Coverage Matrix, ### Equipment-by-Equipment Sizing Summary | Benchmark report includes an equipment-wide sizing chapter. |
| mechanical_design_moc | Mechanical Design and Material of Construction | mechanical_design_moc | ### Mechanical Basis, ### Mechanical Design Input Matrix, ### Shell and Head Thickness Derivation, ### Support and Overturning Derivation, ### Nozzle Reinforcement and Connection Basis, ### Connection and Piping Class Basis, ### Material of Construction Matrix, ### MoC Option Screening, ### Equipment-Wise MoC Justification Matrix, ### Inspection and Maintainability Basis, ### Corrosion and Service Basis, ### Utility and Storage MoC Basis | Benchmark report separates mechanical design and MoC into dedicated sections. |
| storage_utilities | Storage & Utilities | utility_summary | ### Storage Inventory and Buffer Basis, ### Storage Service Matrix, ### Utility Consumption Summary, ### Utility Service System Matrix, ### Utility Peak and Annualized Demand, ### Utility Demand by Major Unit, ### Utility Island Service Basis, ### Header and Thermal-Loop Basis | Benchmark report includes dedicated storage and utility architecture coverage. |
| instrumentation_control | Instrumentation & Process Control | control_plan | ### Control Philosophy, ### Loop Objective Matrix, ### Controlled and Manipulated Variable Register, ### Startup, Shutdown, and Override Basis, ### Alarm and Interlock Basis, ### Utility-Integrated Control Basis, ### Control Loop Sheets | Benchmark report includes a dedicated control philosophy chapter. |
| hazop | HAZOP | hazop_study, hazop_node_register | ### HAZOP Coverage Summary, ### HAZOP Node Basis, ### Critical Node Summary, ### Deviation Cause-Consequence Matrix, ### Recommendation Register | Benchmark report includes node-based HAZOP tables. |
| safety_health_environment_waste | Safety, Health & Environment | safety_environment | ### Safety Basis, ### Hazard and Emergency Response Basis, ### Health and Exposure Basis, ### Environmental and Waste Basis, ### Environmental Control and Monitoring Basis, ### Waste Handling and Disposal Basis, ### Safeguard Linkage | Benchmark report includes a dedicated SHE chapter. |
| layout | Project & Plant Layout | layout | ### Plot Plan Basis, ### Plot Layout Schematic, ### Area Zoning and Separation Basis, ### Equipment Placement Matrix, ### Utility Corridor Matrix, ### Utility Routing and Access Basis, ### Dispatch and Emergency Access Basis | Benchmark report includes plant layout figures and notes. |
| project_cost | Project Cost | cost_model, plant_cost_summary, procurement_basis_decision, logistics_basis_decision | ### Procurement Basis, ### Logistics Basis, ### Project Cost Build-Up Summary, ### Direct Plant Cost Head Allocation, ### Indirect and Contingency Basis, ### Equipment Family Cost Allocation, ### Procurement Timing Basis, ### Installed Equipment Cost Matrix | Benchmark report includes project-cost buildup tables. |
| cost_of_production | Cost of Production | cost_model | ### Cost of Production Summary, ### Manufacturing Cost Build-Up, ### Utility and Raw-Material Cost Basis, ### Unit Cost and Selling Basis | Benchmark report includes cost-of-production breakdown tables. |
| working_capital | Working Capital | working_capital_model | ### Working-Capital Parameter Basis, ### Working-Capital Breakdown, ### Inventory, Receivable, and Payable Basis, ### Procurement-Linked Working-Capital Timing, ### Operations Planning Basis | Benchmark report includes a dedicated working-capital chapter. |
| financial_analysis | Financial Analysis | financial_model, economic_basis_decision, financing_basis_decision, debt_schedule, tax_depreciation_basis, financial_schedule | ### Financing Basis, ### Financial Performance Summary, ### Profitability and Return Summary, ### Funding and Capital Structure Basis, ### Procurement-Linked Working-Capital Basis, ### Debt Service Coverage Schedule, ### Profit and Loss Schedule, ### Cash Accrual and Funding Schedule, ### Lender Coverage Screening | Benchmark report includes multi-year finance schedules and returns. |
| conclusion | Conclusion | - | - | Benchmark report includes a standalone conclusion chapter. |

### Support Contract

| Support ID | Benchmark Title | Required Markers | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| references | References | ## References | Benchmark report includes a dedicated references chapter. |
| appendix_msds | Appendix A: Material Safety Data Sheet | Material Safety Data Sheet | Benchmark report contains an MSDS appendix. |
| appendix_code_backup | Appendix B: Python Code | Python Code | Benchmark report contains a code appendix. |
| appendix_process_design_datasheets | Appendix C: Process Design Data Sheet | Process Design Data Sheet | Benchmark report contains a process design datasheet appendix. |
